transport_closed.title: Connection closed before the operation finished
transport_closed.cause: The connection to a required local or remote runtime closed before Nebula received a complete response.
transport_closed.impact: The affected operation did not complete. Previously committed Nebula data remains unchanged.
transport_closed.confirmed_safe_state: Nebula stopped consuming the incomplete response and did not treat it as a successful result.
steps: Check the affected runtime's health from this incident.
Restart or reconnect the runtime if its health check is unavailable or failing.
Retry only the durable failed operation shown by this incident.
transport_closed.verification: Run the health check and confirm the affected runtime reports ready, then confirm a retry reaches a terminal success state.

protocol_invalid.title: Runtime response was invalid
protocol_invalid.cause: A required component returned a response that does not match the supported Nebula protocol.
protocol_invalid.impact: Nebula rejected the response and the affected operation did not complete.
protocol_invalid.confirmed_safe_state: The invalid response was not applied to durable application state.
steps: Check the component version and compatibility status.
Upgrade or restart the component when the compatibility check identifies a mismatch.
Retry the durable operation after compatibility is restored.
protocol_invalid.verification: Confirm the component health check reports a supported protocol version and the retry completes without a protocol notice.

dependency_unavailable.title: Required dependency is unavailable
dependency_unavailable.cause: Nebula could not reach or start a component required by this operation.
dependency_unavailable.impact: The affected operation is unavailable until the dependency becomes healthy.
dependency_unavailable.confirmed_safe_state: Nebula did not partially complete the operation after the dependency failure.
steps: Run the affected component's health check.
Open its settings and correct the reported availability or configuration problem.
Retry the durable failed operation after the health check passes.
dependency_unavailable.verification: Confirm the component health check reports ready and a new operation can connect successfully.

authentication_failed.title: Authentication failed
authentication_failed.cause: The configured credential was missing, expired, or rejected by the required service.
authentication_failed.impact: Requests that require this credential cannot complete. The credential value was not added to diagnostics.
authentication_failed.confirmed_safe_state: Nebula retained only the credential reference and did not log the credential value.
steps: Open the affected provider or service settings.
Replace or re-authorize the rejected credential.
Run its connection verification before retrying the operation.
authentication_failed.verification: Confirm connection verification succeeds with the updated credential.

timeout.title: Operation timed out
timeout.cause: The operation exceeded its configured bounded time limit before a complete result was available.
timeout.impact: Nebula stopped waiting; the affected operation is not recorded as successful.
timeout.confirmed_safe_state: The timed-out result was not committed as a completed operation.
steps: Check the affected component's current health and load.
Wait for any still-running external work to settle or stop it explicitly.
Retry the durable operation once health is restored.
timeout.verification: Confirm the health check passes and the retried operation completes within its time limit.

rate_limited.title: Service rate limit reached
rate_limited.cause: The service temporarily rejected the operation because its request or usage limit was reached.
rate_limited.impact: The operation did not complete and similar requests may be delayed until the limit resets.
rate_limited.confirmed_safe_state: Nebula did not repeatedly replay the rejected request automatically.
steps: Review the service's current limit and reset status.
Wait until the reported retry window has elapsed.
Retry the durable operation once.
rate_limited.verification: Confirm the service health or usage view no longer reports an active rate limit and the retry is accepted.

permission_denied.title: Permission denied
permission_denied.cause: A Nebula policy, operating-system permission, or service permission denied the requested operation.
permission_denied.impact: The denied operation was not performed.
permission_denied.confirmed_safe_state: Nebula failed closed and did not bypass the denied permission.
steps: Review the affected policy or permission in its settings.
Grant only the minimum required permission outside Diagnostics if the operation is authorized.
Run the relevant health or permission check before retrying.
permission_denied.verification: Confirm the permission check passes and the authorized retry no longer reports a denial.

storage_write_failed.title: Local storage write failed
storage_write_failed.cause: Nebula could not durably write a required local record or file.
storage_write_failed.impact: The affected change may not have been saved and must not be assumed complete.
storage_write_failed.confirmed_safe_state: Nebula reports the operation as failed instead of claiming an unconfirmed durable write.
steps: Check available disk space and the reported storage path permissions.
Run the local storage health check.
Retry only after the health check confirms writable storage.
storage_write_failed.verification: Confirm storage health reports writable and a new bounded write succeeds.

integrity_failed.title: Integrity verification failed
integrity_failed.cause: A required signature, digest, revision, or state invariant did not match the expected value.
integrity_failed.impact: Nebula rejected the affected data or transition to prevent unverified state from being used.
integrity_failed.confirmed_safe_state: The unverified data was not trusted or committed.
steps: Do not retry or replace the affected data until its source is verified.
Open the affected component and review its integrity status.
Create a diagnostics support bundle if the expected source cannot be verified.
integrity_failed.verification: Confirm the source digest, signature, or revision matches a trusted expected value before continuing.

stale_state.title: Saved state changed
stale_state.cause: The operation was based on a revision or runtime state that changed before it could finish.
stale_state.impact: Nebula rejected the stale update; the newer saved state remains authoritative.
steps: Refresh the affected view to load the current state.
Review any changes that occurred since the operation started.
Repeat the action against the current revision if it is still needed.
stale_state.verification: Confirm the view shows the current revision and the repeated action completes without a conflict.

invalid_input.title: Operation input was rejected
invalid_input.cause: The supplied configuration or state did not satisfy the operation's validated contract.
invalid_input.confirmed_safe_state: Invalid input was rejected before the requested change was committed.
steps: Review the specific invalid field or state shown in this incident.
Correct it in the affected view.
Submit the operation again after validation passes.
invalid_input.verification: Confirm the affected view reports valid configuration and accepts the operation.

cancelled.title: Operation stopped
cancelled.cause: The operation ended because its viewer disconnected or a stop request was received.
cancelled.impact: The stopped operation did not reach a successful terminal result.
cancelled.confirmed_safe_state: Nebula did not represent the stopped operation as complete.
steps: Open the affected operation and inspect its terminal state.
Retry only if the prior operation is durably marked stopped or interrupted.
cancelled.verification: Confirm the prior operation is terminal before starting a replacement.

unknown_internal_fault.title: Unclassified internal fault
unknown_internal_fault.cause: Nebula recorded an internal failure but the available sanitized evidence does not identify a verified root cause.
unknown_internal_fault.impact: The affected operation did not complete; no additional impact can be claimed from the available evidence.
unknown_internal_fault.confirmed_safe_state: Nebula did not invent a diagnosis or automatically replay the failed request.
steps: Review the technical evidence and correlation identifiers in this incident.
Run the affected component's health check when available.
Generate a diagnostics support bundle if the fault recurs.
unknown_internal_fault.verification: Confirm the affected component is healthy and a separately initiated operation completes successfully.
